cfo_costbreakdown.heading: Cost Structure
cfo_costbreakdown.askAiPrompt: My cost structure: COGS is {cogsPct}% of revenue ({cogsAmt}), fixed costs are {fixedPct}% ({fixedAmt}). What are the top 3 areas I could reduce costs without hurting growth?
cfo_costbreakdown.costsExceed: Costs exceed revenue by {sym}{n} per {sym}100 earned
